description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 30, 2024 at 10:57 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Highland Avenue at Beverly Boulevard. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling in the leftmost of the two southbound lanes on Highland Avenue when it began to brake to yield to stopped 
traffic ahead. Simultaneously, an SUV that was previously in the right lane changed lanes and approached the Waymo AV closely from 
behind. As the Waymo AV continued to slow, the SUV made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. The SUV then reversed, drove across 
the curbed, grass median, and proceeded to travel north on Highland Avenue. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver’s seating position). Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
